meta.title: Jonathan Brownstein — Data Engineer  — Job 8474867002
meta.description: Data engineer and analytics builder with a master's in economics and 15 years turning messy, multi-source data into reliable pipelines, governed warehouse assets, and dashboards stakeholders actually use. Spent seven yea

hero.description: Data engineer and analytics builder with a master's in economics and 15 years turning messy, multi-source data into reliable pipelines, governed warehouse assets, and dashboards stakeholders actually use. Spent seven years inside a global reinsurer's Chief Data Office designing SQL-heavy ELT workflows on Databricks, optimizing queries across a trillion-record warehouse, and shipping Tableau and Power BI reporting for demanding internal clients. Earlier, I modernized executive reporting at a global manufacturer and, during graduate school, delivered on a contract basis at Wells Fargo — the same flexible, outcomes-first model I am returning to now. I wrapped my full-time role in March 2026 and am available immediately for remote contract work, comfortable collaborating across US time zones and iterating fast in Kanban-style delivery.

highlights.label: SQL development, schema design, and query optimization across large structured and semi-structured datasets
Batch ELT pipelines and scheduled analytical workflows (Databricks; patterns transferable to Airflow, Dagster, Temporal)
Customer-facing dashboards and custom reporting (Tableau, Power BI, SSRS)
Multi-source data integration and API-fed reporting layers

items.title: Senior Data Analyst III
items.context: Data engineering, reporting, and pipeline owner for enterprise analytics programs
items.intro: Owned the analytical layer on top of a governed enterprise data warehouse processing 1T+ records — partnering with data engineering and platform teams to ingest sources, validate outputs, and deliver client-style reporting packages for actuarial, finance, and executive audiences under weekly release cadences.

subsections.title: Pipelines, SQL, and Warehouse Work
bullets: Designed and maintained batch and near-real-time ELT workflows on Databricks, transforming high-volume actuarial, finance, and operational sources into governed analytical datasets.
Wrote and tuned SQL across relational and lakehouse environments to support recurring reporting, ad hoc client requests, and performance-sensitive valuation extracts.

Architected the Field Inventory Report — a metadata and lineage reference that became the authoritative schema map for the enterprise Seriatim Data Warehouse (SDW), accelerating onboarding for new reporting initiatives.
Built the organization's first valuation extract comparison architecture, enabling repeatable deep-dive analysis across time periods and source systems without rebuilding logic for each request.

subsections.title: Client-Facing Dashboards and Custom Reporting
bullets: Delivered interactive Tableau, Power BI, and SSRS dashboards and KPI packs tailored to specific stakeholder groups, replacing manual spreadsheet cycles with self-serve reporting.

Translated ambiguous business questions into scoped data models and visual outputs on tight timelines — the same rapid-prototyping muscle required when a new advertising client needs a bespoke view by end of week.
Partnered with product-adjacent and strategy-facing teams to shape reporting requirements before engineering committed pipeline work.

subsections.title: Data Integrity and Monitoring
bullets: Built statistical outlier detection frameworks (PDF-based anomaly detection) that flagged large-scale attribute shifts before they reached downstream consumers.
Designed action-monitor reporting that surfaced metrics outside tolerance and routed exceptions to accountable owners — a pattern directly applicable to platform-level data-quality monitoring.
Served as technical reviewer for analytics deliverables, enforcing code quality, documentation, and audit-ready standards across releases.

items.title: Assistant Business Controller
items.organization: Chicago Pneumatic Company LLC (Atlas Copco Group)
items.context: Reporting modernization and executive analytics partner
bullets: Partnered with Sales, Marketing, HR, Finance, and executive leadership to modernize KPI reporting and automate recurring operational dashboards.
Designed reporting frameworks that improved data consistency, shortened month-end cycles, and gave leaders a single trusted view across functions.
Bridged business stakeholders and technical teams — scoping data needs, validating outputs, and managing external vendors on analytics projects end to end.

items.title: Contract Data & Reporting Analyst
items.context: Part-time contract engagement during graduate school
bullets: Delivered analytics and reporting on a contract basis while completing my MS in Economics at UNC Charlotte — scoping work, meeting deadlines, and communicating progress without the overhead of a full-time hire.
Produced recurring operational dashboards, Excel and SQL-driven analyses, and summary reports from structured and semi-structured source data for internal stakeholders.
Cleaned, validated, and reconciled reporting inputs in a regulated financial-services environment where accuracy and turnaround time were non-negotiable.
Collaborated with full-time analysts and managers in a fast-paced team that valued reliable contractors who could ship independently.

groups.title: Data Engineering
items: SQL (advanced querying, optimization, schema design), Python, R, batch ELT/ELT on Databricks, data validation and reconciliation, metadata and lineage documentation

groups.title: Visualization & Reporting
items: Tableau, Power BI, SSRS, advanced Excel (Power Query, pivot models, VBA), executive and operational KPI reporting; quick to adopt Holistics or Looker

groups.title: Platforms
items: Databricks lakehouse, relational databases, cloud-hosted enterprise data warehouse (SDW), GCP/AWS-adjacent analytics environments

groups.title: Delivery
items: Kanban-friendly iterative releases, code review discipline, automated QA checks, cross-functional collaboration with product, platform, and QA partners
